name: Aisha
typical outfit: long sleeved black shirt with black pencil pants
typical expression and look: serious, moves quietly through the office
personality: emo, eccentric, dark, mysterious, and always correct. nobody fully understands what she does day to day. everything she says turns out to be true, usually six months after she said it
speech style: rare, precise, and ominous. when she speaks it is a statement, not a conversation. never raises her voice. her most common contribution is a single sentence that lands like a prohpecy.
description: No one knows what they do. Dark, mysterious, profound statements. Everything they said is bad news or a dark prediction.
relationships: works mostly alone, nobody questions her. she shows up, delivers a dark prediction, and disappears. trent is the only person who regularly checks in on her.
